gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/508)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/508)

parts.text: الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ قَرَأَ الْمُسَبِّحَاتِ كُلَّهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يَنَامَ لَمْ يَمُتْ حَتَّى يُدْرِكَ الْقَائِمَ وَ إِنْ مَاتَ كَانَ فِي جِوَارِ مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Hassan, from Ismail Bin Mihran, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Muhammad Bin Sukeyn, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’farasws saying: ‘The one who recites the Musabbihaat (Chapters 17, 57, 59, 61, 62, 64 & 87), all of them, before he sleeps, would not die until he sees Al-Qaimasws; and when he does die, he would be in the vicinity of Muhammadas, the Prophetsaww’.
en.sarwar: 3. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from Muhammad ibn Hassan from Isma’il ibn Mehran from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn abu Hamza from Muhammad ibn Sukayn from ‘ Amr ibn Shimr from Jabir who has said the following: “I heard abu Ja’far (a.s.) saying, ‘Whoever reads all the chapters that begin with the word, ‘Sabbaha, or Yusabbihu’ before going to sleep will not die before seeing the twelfth Imam, and when he dies, he will be in the neighborhood of Muhammad, recipient of divine supreme covenant.’”
